assertions.assertion: Program.cs maps a /logout endpoint (via MapGet, controller action, or Razor page)
assertions.rationale: Mapping endpoints is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge

assertions.assertion: The logout handler calls SignOutAsync for the cookie authentication scheme to clear the local session
assertions.rationale: SignOutAsync for cookies is well-documented standard behavior

assertions.assertion: The logout handler calls SignOutAsync for the OIDC scheme to trigger redirect to IdentityServer's end session endpoint
assertions.rationale: The dual sign-out pattern is well-known for OIDC scenarios
